mapper.select: SELECT c.code_id, c.code_group_id, g.group_code, c.code_value, c.code_name, c.sort_order, c.is_active FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE c JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP g ON g.code_group_id = c.code_group_id WHERE g.group_code = #{groupCode} AND c.is_active = TRUE AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.sort_order
SELECT code_group_id, group_code, group_name, description, sort_order, is_active FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE is_active = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT code_group_id, group_code, group_name, description, sort_order, is_active, created_at, business_unit, category_level, parent_group_code, parent_code_value FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order, code_group_id

SELECT code_group_id, group_code, group_name, description, sort_order, is_active, created_at, business_unit, category_level, parent_group_code, parent_code_value FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE code_group_id = #{codeGroupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP (group_code, group_name, description, sort_order, is_active, business_unit, category_level, parent_group_code, parent_code_value, created_id, created_at) VALUES (#{groupCode}, #{groupName}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive}, #{businessUnit}, #{categoryLevel}, #{parentGroupCode}, #{parentCodeValue}, #{createdId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP SET group_code = #{groupCode}, group_name = #{groupName}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, business_unit = #{businessUnit}, category_level = #{categoryLevel}, parent_group_code = #{parentGroupCode}, parent_code_value = #{parentCodeValue}, updated_id = #{updatedId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE code_group_id = #{codeGroupId}
UPDATE TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP SET deleted_id = #{deletedId}, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE code_group_id = #{codeGroupId}
mapper.select: SELECT code_id, code_group_id, code_value, code_name, sort_order, is_active FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE WHERE code_group_id = #{codeGroupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order, code_id

SELECT c.code_id, c.code_group_id, g.group_code, c.code_value, c.code_name, c.sort_order, c.is_active FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE c JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP g ON g.code_group_id = c.code_group_id WHERE c.code_id = #{codeId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HKTMS_CODE (code_group_id, code_value, code_name, sort_order, is_active, created_id, created_at) VALUES (#{codeGroupId}, #{codeValue}, #{codeName}, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive}, #{createdId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HKTMS_CODE SET code_value = #{codeValue}, code_name = #{codeName}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_id = #{updatedId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE code_id = #{codeId}
UPDATE TB_HKTMS_CODE SET deleted_id = #{deletedId}, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE code_id = #{codeId}
